note: Curated MCP servers for one-click add. Specs are best-effort and editable — adjust command/args/url/inputs as upstream packages change. `popular: true` entries feed the top-10 gallery; the rest show under "More". `auth`: none = installs unattended; token = daemon configures it with the secret you enter; oauth = the server registers, then you authenticate once inside a Claude session (the daemon can't do the browser flow). `inputs[].target`: env (a -e KEY=val secret/value), arg (appended to the stdio command), header (an -H "Name: value"), or url (substituted into the endpoint).

servers.title: Context7
servers.name: context7
servers.description: Pulls up-to-date, version-specific docs and code examples for any library straight into context.

servers.title: Sequential Thinking
servers.name: sequential-thinking
servers.description: A structured step-by-step reasoning tool for breaking hard problems into revisable thoughts.

servers.title: Fetch
servers.name: fetch
servers.description: Fetches a URL and converts the page to clean markdown for the model to read. Requires uv/uvx on the host.

servers.title: Playwright
servers.name: playwright
servers.description: Drives a real browser (navigate, click, type, snapshot) via Playwright's accessibility tree.

servers.title: Filesystem
servers.name: filesystem

inputs.label: Allowed directory
inputs.help: Absolute path the server is allowed to read/write. Pass more than one by adding the rest in the custom form.

servers.description: Sandboxed read/write access to one or more directories you explicitly allow.

servers.title: Memory
servers.name: memory
servers.description: A persistent knowledge-graph memory the model can write entities and relations into across sessions.

servers.title: GitHub
servers.name: github

inputs.label: GitHub personal access token
inputs.help: Create at github.com/settings/tokens (repo scope). Stored encrypted.

servers.description: Read/write GitHub: repos, issues, PRs, code search, and file contents.

servers.title: PostgreSQL
servers.name: postgres

inputs.label: Connection string
inputs.help: Full postgres:// URL. Read-only schema + query access.

servers.description: Inspect schema and run read-only SQL against a PostgreSQL database.

servers.title: Brave Search
servers.name: brave-search

inputs.label: Brave Search API key
inputs.help: Get a free key at api-dashboard.search.brave.com. Stored encrypted.

servers.description: Web and local search via the Brave Search API.

servers.title: Sentry
servers.name: sentry
servers.description: Query Sentry issues and errors. Registers now; authenticate once via /mcp inside a Claude session.

servers.title: Notion
servers.name: notion
servers.description: Read and write Notion pages and databases. OAuth — authenticate once inside a Claude session.

servers.title: Linear
servers.name: linear
servers.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, and cycles. OAuth — authenticate once inside a Claude session.
